creator: akanar@pm.me
text:
(In reply to Todd martin from comment #52)
Not patching for me.


Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...

|+++ mono/Makefile	2020-11-04 19:32:22.025229113 -0800

Hunk #6 succeeded at 61.
